/run/current-system/sw/bin/clang++ -ffreestanding -fno-builtin -fno-stack-protector -mno-red-zone -Wall -Wextra -O2 -fno-stack-check -fno-lto -fno-PIC -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -m64 -march=x86-64 -mno-sse2 -mno-sse -mno-mmx -mcmodel=kernel -mabi=sysv -nostdlib -ffreestanding -O2 -T/home/dui/work/custom_kernel/link.ld CMakeFiles/ktkernel.dir/ktkernel/core/entry.cpp.obj -o ktkernel
